news.headline: TowerCom partners with Sitetracker to manage growth through standardized telecom operations; aims to improve efficiency.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between TowerCom Enterprises, a prominent national wireless infrastructure developer, and Sitetracker. This collaboration aims to standardize telecommunications operations. Sitetracker, a renowned leader in deployment operations management, will provide tools for TowerCom to streamline their processes efficiently. The agreement was announced in Montclair, N.J. on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Global Sustainable Fuel Market projected to reach $299.9 billion by 2029, growing at 9.1% CAGR. Increased demand driven by environmental regulations and consumer preference for eco-friendly products.
news.summary: The global Sustainable Fuel Market is projected to grow from USD 193.8 billion in 2024 to USD 299.9 billion by 2029, at a CAGR of 9.1%. Environmental regulations and policies worldwide are driving the need for reduced carbon emissions, leading governments to enforce measures like carbon pricing and blending regulations. These regulations ensure a constant demand for sustainable fuels, with Asia Pacific being the largest market. Consumer preferences for eco-friendly products are also pushing businesses to adopt sustainable practices, such as the use of renewable energy. This information was provided by a report from MarketsandMarkets™.

news.headline: Sunrise New Energy secures $13.76M low-interest loan from CCB for further growth.
Imbalance in milk production: 10% of cows producing 85% of milk; experts recommend breeding strategies for equal distribution.
AbbVie acquires Celsius Therapeutics for CEL383 anti-TREM1 antibody to treat IBD. NORTH CHICAGO, June 27, 2024. (ABBV)
news.summary: AbbVie, a pharmaceutical company traded as ABBV on NYSE, has revealed its acquisition of Celsius, a company that has developed CEL383, a promising anti-Triggering Receptor Expressed on Myeloid Cells 1 (TREM1) antibody. This antibody is being considered for the treatment of inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). The acquisition was announced in North Chicago, Illinois on June 27, 2024. This move reflects AbbVie's strategic investment in innovative therapies, which may potentially address the needs of patients with IBD.

news.headline: Matrix Cup Cyber Security Competition open in Qingdao, China on June 26, 2024; hosted by 360, at the Qingdao Int'l Convention Center.
news.summary: In Qingdao, China, the Matrix Cup Cyber Security Competition, dubbed the Global Digital Intelligence Security Conference, commenced on June 26th at the Qingdao International Convention Center. Hosted by 360, the opening ceremony marked the beginning of the prestigious event.

news.headline: Micron Tech stock falls after Q3 report, beats revenue estimates of $6.81B and EPS estimates of 62 cents. $2.48B operating cash flow.
news.summary: Micron Technology Inc's (NASDAQ:MU) shares dipped after the company disclosed its Q3 earnings report and provided a lukewarm revenue guidance. The revenue for the quarter stood at $6.81 billion, surpassing estimates of $6.634 billion. Earnings per share (EPS) for Q3 were 62 cents, beating estimates of 49 cents. Operating cash flow for the quarter was $2.48 billion, an increase from $1.22 billion in the previous quarter and $24 million in the same period last year. Adjusted free cash flow was reported at $425 million. Micron ended the quarter with $9.22 billion in cash, marketable securities, and restricted cash. The company attributed the positive results to strong Artificial Intelligence (AI) demand and effective execution. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Hut 8 Corp's stock is up after being added to the Russell 3000. Analyst raised target price from $14 to $22.
news.summary: Shares of Bitcoin miner Hut 8 Corp (NASDAQ: HUT) saw an increase in trading on Thursday as the company is set to join the Russell 3000 index. This news, along with positive analyst coverage, drove the stock higher. Canaccord Genuity analyst Joseph Vafi boosted his price target for Hut 8 from $14 to $22, giving the stock a Buy rating. Other recent analyst updates include Needham maintaining a Buy rating with a price target of $15, and Benchmark also maintaining a Buy rating while raising its target. These developments indicate a growing bullish sentiment towards Hut 8.

news.headline: Vertex Companies announces leadership changes and industry recognition for growth and global expansion. Changes effective from June 27, 2024.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024 in Weymouth, Massachusetts, The Vertex Companies, LLC (Vertex), a top Professional Services provider, revealed significant industry recognition, leadership shifts, and strategic growth. Vertex secured notable accolades in the industry and expressed pride in its accomplishments.

news.headline: Yesway supports communities affected by South Fork Fire and Salt Wildfire in New Mexico by inviting donations at store locations.
news.summary: The rapidly expanding convenience store chain, Yesway, based in Fort Worth, Texas, has extended an invitation to customers and supplier partners to contribute at all Yesway and Allsup's store locations. This initiative, launched on June 27, 2024, aims to gather donations to support a cause. Yesway, known for its growth trajectory, has pledged to donate a significant amount as part of this campaign.

news.headline: AIMA introduced AIMA Q7 at 2024 World Intelligent Industry Expo, focusing on "Intelligent Flagship, Born for Family".
news.summary: In Tianjin, China, AIMA took part in the 2024 World Intelligent Industry Expo on June 20. They introduced the AIMA Q7 as their official product with the slogan "Intelligent Flagship, Born for Family." The expo is a platform presenting the latest innovations in the industry and attracted significant attention.

news.headline: Craig Montgomery appointed as Chief Strategy Officer at Lower, with aim to become a top-five national lender. 27-year industry veteran joins the team.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, on June 27, 2024, Lower®, a mortgage fintech company, revealed the appointment of Craig Montgomery as its new Chief Strategy Officer. With 27 years of experience in the industry, Montgomery’s recruitment is crucial to Lower's goal of becoming one of the top five national lenders. This strategic move aims to leverage Montgomery's established track record in the industry.

news.headline: Telos Corp (NASDAQ: TLS) to join Russell 3000 Index on July 1, 2024, following FTSE Russell's list release on June 21, 2024.
news.summary: Telos Corporation, a top provider of cyber, cloud, and enterprise security solutions for highly secure organizations, will be included in the Russell 3000® Index following the 2024 annual reconstitution of Russell U.S. Indexes. The company (NASDAQ: TLS) is set to join the index at the opening of U.S. equity markets on July 1, 2024. This decision was based on a preliminary list of additions released by FTSE Russell on June 21, 2024.

news.headline: Benchmark Email integrates with Canva to simplify email design; announcement made on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Benchmark Email, a leading provider of sales and marketing software, announced a new integration with Canva, the comprehensive visual communication platform. This integration aims to further enhance Benchmark's services for marketers by providing them with the ability to create visually appealing emails efficiently. Benchmark Email is renowned for assisting marketers in creating and delivering attractive emails, solidifying its position as an industry leader.

news.headline: Kearney's 2024 Circular Fashion Index shows average score up 8% to 3.2/10 across 235 brands; top 10 rankings stale.
news.summary: A recent study revealed that the global fashion industry has only been giving lip service to environmental concerns without taking significant actions. Surprisingly, 9 out of the top 10 companies in the industry have maintained their positions since 2023. Although 7 circularity metrics are being monitored, none of the companies have implemented them effectively. With regulatory pressure on the rise, it is expected that brands will be compelled to increase their efforts in addressing environmental issues.

news.headline: Sandals Resorts brand boosts regional airline growth, 178% YOY increase in service to Saint Vincent and the Grenadines.
news.summary: The significant impact of the Sandals Resorts brand on the increased air service in the Caribbean region has resulted in an extraordinary 178% year-over-year growth in service to Saint Vincent and the Grenadines. This surge in airlift highlights the demonstrable brand effect and its influence on enhancing connectivity. The developments mark a notable increase in travel options and accessibility in the region, showcasing the brand's strong presence and ability to drive growth in the airline industry. The data reflects a substantial boost in services, underscoring the brand's role in shaping the tourism landscape in the Caribbean.

news.headline: Coveo wins AI Search Innovation Award at 7th AI Breakthrough Awards. Standout AI and Machine Learning solutions recognized. (Characters: 108)
news.summary: A renowned global annual awards program recently recognized exceptional AI and machine learning solutions and companies. The event took place in Montreal and San Francisco on June 27, 2024. Coveo, listed on the TSX as CVO, emerged as the top enterprise AI platform specializing in AI Search and generative AI (GenAI).

news.headline: Rheem® releases fifth annual Sustainability Progress Report highlighting impact in sustainability through intelligent products and responsible processes.
news.summary: Rheem®, a company headquartered in Atlanta known for manufacturing water heating and HVAC products, recently published its fifth annual Sustainability Progress Report. The report highlights the company's achievements in adopting intelligent products, implementing responsible processes, and enhancing training practices. This initiative aims to promote sustainability within the organization. The report encompasses data from the past year and showcases the impact of Rheem's efforts. This signifies the commitment of Rheem® towards sustainability and its dedication to making a positive difference.

news.headline: Serve Robotics expands delivery service in Koreatown, Los Angeles, and signs supply agreement for 2,000 robots with upgraded lidar hardware.
news.summary: A popular delivery service has recently expanded its coverage to include Koreatown in Los Angeles. An expanded supply agreement has been made to enhance 2,000 robots with upgraded lidar hardware. This initiative aims to support the scaling of the robotic fleet. The development was announced in San Francisco on June 27, 2024, by Serve Robotics Inc. (Nasdaq: SERV), a prominent autonomous technology company.

news.headline: BrainStorm Cell Therapeutics Inc. priced a $4.0 million registered direct offering, developing adult stem cell therapeutics.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, BrainStorm Cell Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: BCLI) revealed a recent development in their work on adult stem cell therapeutics for neurodegenerative diseases. The company has initiated a securities purchase agreement with a sole entity.

news.headline: FIT's Beauty Think Tank explores accessible beauty post Beauty Center launch. Study examines inclusivity in industry across 3 realms. NY, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Research has delved into the inclusivity within the industry across three main areas: emotional impact, economic consequences, and social implications. The study, conducted by students from the Fashion Institute of Technology's (FIT) master's program in Cosmetics and Fragrance Marketing, was unveiled in New York on June 27, 2024. The research sheds light on the importance of fostering diversity and equality in the industry.

news.headline: Catawba College partners with Dreamscape Learn to bring immersive learning experiences to the classroom.
news.summary: Catawba College, a private liberal arts college located in North Carolina, has recently disclosed a collaboration with Dreamscape Learn on June 27, 2024. This partnership aims to integrate effective immersive learning experiences. This move is set to enhance the educational offerings at the college, providing students with innovative methods of learning. Through this initiative, students can anticipate a more engaging and interactive learning environment.

news.headline: ProperXPM plans $100 million for roll-up of multifamily property management companies in Chicago for expansion.
news.summary: ProperXPM, a top tech-enabled experiential property management company based in Chicago, has unveiled a major expansion plan supported by funding of potentially $100 million. This initiative involves consolidating various multifamily property management firms with the goal of transforming the industry.

news.headline: CallTrackingMetrics announces updates: Number Pools introduced, AI fees halved, and AI model options streamlined. #EfficiencyBoosted #ValueEnhanced
news.summary: A top conversation analytics platform has unveiled significant upgrades for marketers, aimed at enhancing efficiency and value. CallTrackingMetrics, a renowned company in global conversation analytics, revealed multiple key product enhancements on June 27, 2024, in MILLERSVILLE, Md. These updates are set to positively impact marketing strategies, offering improved tools and features to streamline processes and increase value for businesses.

news.headline: Alamar Biosciences partners with Biomarkers of Aging Consortium to enhance longevity research through innovative proteomics.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Fremont, California, Alamar Biosciences announced a partnership with the Biomarkers of Aging Consortium to advance precision proteomics for early disease detection. Alamar Biosciences focuses on enabling early disease detection using proteomics technology, while the Biomarkers of Aging Consortium is dedicated to developing and validating biomarkers of aging. This collaboration aims to enhance the accuracy and efficiency of detecting diseases at their earliest stages.

news.headline: CEO Steve Cahillane emphasizes importance of culture, values, and people to build Kellanova. Chicago, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Steve Cahillane, who serves as the Chairman, President, and CEO of Kellanova, shared insights on June 27, 2024, in Chicago. He highlighted the importance of organizational culture and values, drawn from his experience at Kellogg Company and now at Kellanova. Cahillane emphasized that these elements play a crucial role in a company's success.

news.headline: Advisor360° integrates with FMG to streamline marketing for wealth managers. The partnership offers new capabilities for advisors.
news.summary: Advisor360°, a prominent integrated technology provider for wealth managers based in Weston, Mass, has revealed enhanced features in collaboration with FMG, an all-in-one marketing solution for advisors.

news.headline: Tyler Technologies opens new office in Orono, Maine, to accommodate 75 team members. #TYL
news.summary: Tyler Technologies has recently inaugurated a new office in Orono, Maine, to accommodate around 75 team members.

news.headline: Viridien announces reverse share split, aiming to increase share value for investors.
Spalding and Harlem Globetrotters collaborate on first-ever consumer game ball release, limited edition in history.
news.summary: A renowned basketball equipment company and a globally celebrated basketball team have collaborated to launch a unique, commemorative game ball for the first time ever. This special edition, named Spalding x Harlem Globetrotters, will be available to fans from June 27, 2024 onwards. The limited-release of this distinctive basketball signifies a historic moment, showcasing the partnership between Spalding and the Harlem Globetrotters. The joint effort aims to provide fans with an exclusive product that blends the quality associated with Spalding equipment and the iconic status of the Harlem Globetrotters. This collaboration is set to excite basketball enthusiasts, with the limited-edition game ball likely to be highly sought-after.

news.headline: Harvest Yard, Somm. Hotel, and River Run Townhomes to complete in mid-2025 in Woodinville, WA. Tower cranes present for ongoing transformation.
news.summary: In mid-2025, three major construction projects in the Hollywood District of Woodinville, Washington will be completed. These projects include Harvest Yard, the Somm. Hotel, and River Run Townhomes. The development process can be observed with tower cranes in action, signaling significant progress in the area. This transformation in the Hollywood District is set to reshape the landscape, offering new opportunities and amenities for residents and visitors alike.

news.headline: SAMBAZON releases 3rd Impact Report on economic, social, environmental standards. From San Clemente, CA. June 27, 2024.
news.summary: SAMBAZON, a company based in San Clemente, California, emphasized their commitment to measuring economic impact, social standards for stakeholder well-being, and environmental standards for planet protection. On June 27, 2024, SAMBAZON, which stands for Sustainable Management of the Brazilian Amazon, highlighted these values. They are known as the top supplier in their industry.

news.headline: High Wire Networks sold its technology services business assets in an all-cash deal to focus on its AI-powered managed cybersecurity services. This move aims to boost growth and development of its Overwatch Managed Cybersecurity Business and recurring revenue streams.
news.summary: Proceeds from the sale will be used to enhance the growth and advancement of the company's acclaimed Overwatch Managed Cybersecurity Business and its higher-margin recurring revenue streams.

news.headline: Perpetua Resources Corp. (Nasdaq: PPTA) released its 2023 Sustainability Report showcasing advancements in sustainability.
news.summary: In Boise, Idaho, on June 27, 2024, Perpetua Resources Corp. (Nasdaq: PPTA) (TSX: PPTA) unveiled its 2023 Sustainability Report. The report, which focuses on Perpetua Resources' efforts in environmental and social advancement, showcases significant milestones. The Company's commitment to sustainability and progress is evident in the comprehensive report, which outlines key accomplishments and initiatives.

news.headline: GT Biopharma's IND application for GTB-3650, a NK cell engager for CD33+ Leukemia, cleared by FDA for Phase 1 trial in 2024.
news.summary: In San Francisco, California, on June 27, 2024, GT Biopharma, Inc. disclosed that the FDA has approved its Investigational New Drug (IND) application for GTB-3650. This milestone permits the company to initiate a Phase 1 clinical trial expected to commence in the latter half of 2024. GT Biopharma, a clinical stage immuno-oncology entity specializing in pioneering therapeutics leveraging its exclusive TriKE® platform centered on natural killer (NK) cell engager technology, is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol GTBP.

news.headline: Terranet extends loan by SEK 8 million, now totaling SEK 8 million, with maturity date of June 30, 2025.
news.summary: Today, Terranet has reached an agreement with its current lenders to extend a portion of the current loan, amounting to SEK 8 million. This extension will last for an additional twelve months, with the loan now set to mature on June 30, 2025.

news.headline: Music Licensing, Inc. received third royalty payments from iconic artists like Elton John, Miley Cyrus, and Lil Wayne.
news.summary: In Naples, FL, on June 27, 2024, Music Licensing, Inc. (OTC: SONG) has received its third royalty payments successfully. These payments stem from owning the rights to a group of musical works by illustrious artists like Elton John, Miley Cyrus, Lil Wayne, Lil Nas X, XXXTENTACION, and Halsey. The company's strategic ownership of these artists' intellectual properties has proven lucrative, reflecting its commitment to managing and profiting from these renowned musicians' works.

news.headline: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. appoints Brett Fenn as Managing Director, Head of Business Banking.
news.summary: In Dallas on June 27, 2024, Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI) revealed the appointment of Brett Fenn as Managing Director, Head of Business Banking for Texas Capital. Fenn's new role is effective immediately.

news.headline: Wrike wins "Best AI-Based Solution for Manufacturing" in the AI Breakthrough Awards program by Tech Breakthrough.
news.summary: Wrike, a work management platform based in San Diego, was recently awarded the title of “Best AI-based Solution for Manufacturing” in the prestigious seventh annual AI Breakthrough Awards by Tech Breakthrough. This recognition highlights Wrike's technological innovation in leveraging artificial intelligence within manufacturing processes. The award signifies Wrike’s substantial influence on project management procedures, showcasing its effectiveness in streamlining operations. This accolade underscores Wrike's commitment to excellence and advancement in the global AI market.

news.headline: JD Rogers promoted to Vice President & Chief Information Security Officer at American Financial Group, Inc. (AFG), joining in 2008.
news.summary: American Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: AFG) based in Cincinnati has promoted JD Rogers to the position of Vice President & Chief Information Security Officer. Rogers, who has been with the company since 2008, led the Enterprise Information Security Group (EISG) from 2013. Previously, he was the Divisional Senior Vice President of AFG's property and casualty insurance operations, Great American Insurance Group. The promotion signifies his expertise and contributions to the company's cybersecurity strategies.

news.headline: GuidePoint Security partners with Quokka in Federal Emerging Cyber Vendor Program in Herndon, VA. #cybersecurity
news.summary: Quokka has recently become a part of GuidePoint Security's Emerging Cyber Vendor Program, based in Herndon, Virginia. This marks an important development in the cybersecurity industry, as Quokka joins a select group of innovative companies working with GuidePoint Security. This partnership aims to enhance cybersecurity solutions and services, benefiting clients with cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Core4ce in Arlington, VA appoints Todd Harbour as CTO and launches innovation incubator "The Forge", with Kim Kok as VP and Michael Sass as Head of Data Engineering.
news.summary: Core4ce, a federal contractor specializing in data and cyber operations, based in Arlington, VA, has revealed three leadership changes. Todd Harbour, co-founder and managing partner, has been appointed Chief Technology Officer to lead The Forge, the company's innovation incubator. Joining Harbour are Kim Kok, the new Vice President of Sales and Emerging Technology, and Michael Sass, the Head of Data Engineering and Analytics. This move marks an expansion in Core4ce's leadership team as they focus on enhancing their technological capabilities.

news.headline: Alliance Trust PLC reports Net Asset Value at £800 million, showing a 10% increase from last quarter.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is projected to expand by 6% in 2021, the fastest growth rate since 1973. This growth is primarily attributed to the widespread vaccination campaigns and unprecedented government stimulus measures. The report also highlights that the world GDP is anticipated to reach $88 trillion this year. However, the recovery is expected to be uneven across countries, with advanced economies likely to lead the way. Developing economies are anticipated to face challenges due to slower vaccination progress and limited fiscal support. Inflation rates are also projected to rise, particularly in the United States and parts of Europe. Additionally, the report suggests that global trade is set to increase by 8%, driven by the robust recovery in both goods and services sectors. Despite these positive projections, uncertainties remain, such as the emergence of new variants of the virus and potential delays in vaccine distribution. Overall, the outlook is cautiously optimistic, with hopes for a sustained and inclusive recovery in the coming months.

news.headline: Elton John teams up with eBay to sell his pre-loved fashion collection for Elton John AIDS Foundation. Hundreds of items available globally.
news.summary: "Rocket Man Resale" is showcasing a vast collection of clothing, shoes, and accessories from Elton John and associates on eBay for global shoppers. On June 27, 2024, the initiative was announced to coincide with Pride Month, where Elton John's iconic wardrobe is up for sale on eBay in support of the Elton John AIDS Foundation. This effort includes hundreds of pieces available for purchase, offering a unique opportunity for fans and fashion enthusiasts to own a piece of music and pop culture history.

news.headline: Automation Anywhere named to 2024 Top Most Loved Workplaces® for LGBTQ+ employees, ranking high for LGBTQ+ employee support.
news.summary: Automation Anywhere, a leading company in AI-powered automation solutions, has been recognized for its dedication to supporting and empowering LGBTQ+ employees. Based in San Jose, Calif., the company made its first appearance on the Top Most Loved Workplace® List. This achievement reflects the company's commitment to fostering an inclusive work environment. The news was released on June 27, 2024, by PR Newswire.

news.headline: Converge Technology Solutions named North America Storage Partner of the Year by Hewlett Packard Enterprise. TSX: CTS.
news.summary: In June 27, 2024, Toronto and Gatineau, QC witnessed Converge Technology Solutions Corp. ("Converge" or "the Company") (TSX: CTS) receiving the prestigious North America Storage Partner of the Year award from Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) at the recent HPE Discover event. This recognition highlights Converge's exceptional performance in the industry.

news.headline: Malaysia Blockchain Week (MYBW) to debut in July 2024, marking the country's foray into Web3. Event in Kuala Lumpur with Malaysia Digital Economy Corporation.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Malaysia announced its entrance into the Web3 blockchain sector through the launch of Malaysia Blockchain Week (MYBW) in collaboration with the Malaysia Digital Economy Corporation (MDEC). The event marks the country's official foray into the industry with Minister of Digital, YB Tuan Gobind Singh leading the initiative. This move reflects Malaysia's commitment to embracing blockchain technology in the digital economy.

news.headline: Baseten launches Chains, a framework for Compound AI Systems, built on the Truss framework.
news.summary: Earlier on June 27, 2024, in San Francisco, a notable company known for high-performance AI inference, Baseten, unveiled the beta version of Chains. This software, developed from Baseten's Truss framework, aims to optimize the efficiency of products that rely on multiple AI models. This release marks a significant advancement in improving product performance and highlights Baseten's commitment to innovation in the AI industry.

news.headline: Illumex secures $13M funding for GenAI, creating cohesive data environment for AI. Enhanced reliability and transparency.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024 in New York, illumex, a Generative Semantic Fabric platform for structured enterprise, was introduced. This platform serves as an intermediary layer that addresses data silos by providing context and enhancing data with meaning. This functionality enables the facilitation of trustworthy and transparent AI projects.

news.headline: Mytheresa & Flamingo Estate team up for 'The Railroad Racetrack' in East Hampton, a luxury shopping experience.
news.summary: In June 27, 2024, Mytheresa and Flamingo Estate are continuing their collaboration by launching a seasonal pop-up in East Hampton, NY. Following their successful partnership in 2023, the experiential destination will feature the Railroad Racetrack, offering a variety of attractions and experiences. This initiative aims to attract visitors and guests to enjoy the unique offerings provided by the partnership.
